entries.title: Dragon Ball
entries.synopsis: Young Goku meets Bulma and joins her quest to collect the seven wish-granting Dragon Balls while training as a martial artist.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Z
entries.synopsis: An adult Goku discovers his alien Saiyan heritage and defends Earth through escalating battles against ever-stronger cosmic threats.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods
entries.synopsis: The God of Destruction Beerus awakens and seeks out the legendary Super Saiyan God, drawing Goku into a fight beyond his limits.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Z: Resurrection 'F'
entries.synopsis: A revived Frieza returns to Earth for revenge, forcing Goku and Vegeta to unleash new transformations to stop him.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Super
entries.synopsis: Picking up after Majin Buu's defeat, Goku and friends face gods, universal tournaments, and new rivals from across the multiverse.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Super: Broly
entries.synopsis: A surviving Saiyan named Broly, raised in secret with immense power, is set loose on Earth by a vengeful old enemy.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
entries.synopsis: The Red Ribbon Army resurfaces with android super-warriors, pushing Gohan and Piccolo into the spotlight to protect their families.

entries.title: Dragon Ball Daima
entries.synopsis: A curse shrinks Goku and his allies into children, sending them on a journey through the Demon Realm to reverse it.

entries.title: Attack on Titan
entries.synopsis: After giant Titans breach humanity's walls, young Eren Yeager vows to join the Survey Corps and wipe out the man-eating creatures.

entries.title: Attack on Titan Season 2
entries.synopsis: New Titan attacks on Wall Rose force the Survey Corps to confront traitors hiding within humanity's own ranks.

entries.title: Attack on Titan Season 3 Part 1
entries.synopsis: A political power struggle inside the capital forces Eren and his squad into a deadly conflict with their own government.

entries.title: Attack on Titan Season 3 Part 2
entries.synopsis: The Survey Corps finally ventures beyond the walls, uncovering devastating truths about the origin of the Titans.

entries.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season
entries.synopsis: The story shifts to the nation of Marley, revealing the world beyond the walls and the enemies who see Eren's people as monsters.

entries.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season Part 2
entries.synopsis: As Eren's true plan comes to light, former enemies must decide whether to unite against a catastrophic threat to the world.

entries.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season - The Final Chapters
entries.synopsis: Former rivals join forces in a last, desperate stand to stop Eren's rampage before it destroys the rest of the world.

entries.title: Death Note
entries.synopsis: A brilliant student gains a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, sparking a battle of wits with a genius detective.

entries.title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
entries.synopsis: A closer adaptation of the manga, following the Elric brothers' quest for the Philosopher's Stone amid a nation-spanning conspiracy.

entries.title: One Punch Man Season 1
entries.synopsis: Saitama can defeat any enemy with a single punch, leaving him bored and searching for a worthy opponent as a registered hero.

entries.title: One Punch Man Season 2
entries.synopsis: Saitama and his disciple Genos face a new monster-summoning organization while Saitama struggles for recognition among heroes.

entries.title: One Punch Man Season 3
entries.synopsis: The Monster Association's full-scale assault escalates, pulling Saitama and the Hero Association into their biggest fight yet.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
entries.synopsis: After his family is slaughtered by a demon, Tanjiro becomes a demon slayer to cure his sister Nezuko and avenge his family.

entries.title: Demon Slayer the Movie: Mugen Train
entries.synopsis: Tanjiro and the Flame Hashira Rengoku join forces aboard a train where passengers are vanishing to a powerful demon.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Entertainment District Arc
entries.synopsis: Tanjiro joins Sound Hashira Tengen on an undercover mission through Yoshiwara's Entertainment District to hunt a powerful demon.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Swordsmith Village Arc
entries.synopsis: Recovering with a new arm, Tanjiro travels to the secretive Swordsmith Village, which comes under attack by Upper Rank demons.

entries.title: Demon Slayer: Hashira Training Arc
entries.synopsis: The Demon Slayer Corps' elite Hashira train the surviving slayers to prepare for the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji.

entries.title: Demon Slayer the Movie: Infinity Castle
entries.synopsis: The Demon Slayer Corps launches its final assault inside Muzan's shifting Infinity Castle stronghold, in a planned three-part film saga.

entries.title: Sword Art Online
entries.synopsis: Thousands of players are trapped in a deadly virtual reality game where death in-game means death in real life.

entries.title: Sword Art Online II
entries.synopsis: Kirito investigates a new gun-based death game and later a sniper targeting players inside another virtual world.

entries.title: Sword Art Online: Alicization
entries.synopsis: Kirito wakes in a mysterious new virtual world built on an advanced AI project, with no memory of how he arrived.

entries.title: Sword Art Online: Alicization - War of Underworld
entries.synopsis: A hostile army invades the Underworld simulation, forcing Kirito's friends to defend it while he lies comatose.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 1
entries.synopsis: In a world where most people have superpowers, powerless Izuku Midoriya trains under the world's greatest hero to become one himself.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 2
entries.synopsis: Izuku and his classmates compete in U.A.'s Sports Festival before facing internships and a deadly villain attack.

entries.title: My Hero Academia the Movie: Two Heroes
entries.synopsis: Izuku and All Might travel to a floating city for a hero expo that comes under attack from a mysterious villain.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 3
entries.synopsis: As All Might's power fades, Izuku and his classmates face a training camp ambush and the return of a dangerous villain group.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 4
entries.synopsis: A new hero internship pulls Izuku into the criminal underworld of Shie Hassaikai, colliding with a young girl in danger.

entries.title: My Hero Academia: Heroes Rising
entries.synopsis: Class 1-A takes on a remote island internship that turns into a real battle against a villain hunting a powerful child.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 5
entries.synopsis: Class 1-A trains against rival hero students while a new generation of villains rises from the ashes of the League.

entries.title: My Hero Academia: World Heroes' Mission
entries.synopsis: A global extremist group targeting people with powers forces heroes worldwide, including Izuku, into a race to stop them.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 6
entries.synopsis: An all-out war erupts between heroes and the Paranormal Liberation Front, forcing devastating losses on both sides.

entries.title: My Hero Academia Season 7
entries.synopsis: In the war's aftermath, Izuku and his allies push to hunt down the fractured remnants of the villain alliance.

entries.title: My Hero Academia: You're Next
entries.synopsis: A new symbol of fear rises to challenge society heroes, pushing Izuku and his classmates into one of their toughest fights.

entries.title: Hunter x Hunter (2011)
entries.synopsis: A full remake following Gon and his new friends through the Hunter Exam, and into ever more dangerous adventures.

entries.title: Hunter x Hunter: Phantom Rouge
entries.synopsis: Kurapika is pulled back into conflict with the Phantom Troupe when a former member resurfaces with a dangerous new ability.

entries.title: Hunter x Hunter: The Last Mission
entries.synopsis: Gon and friends investigate a deadly video game that has been trapping and killing its players in the real world.

entries.title: Tokyo Ghoul
entries.synopsis: After a near-fatal encounter, college student Ken Kaneki becomes a half-ghoul struggling to survive between two worlds.

entries.title: Tokyo Ghoul (Root A)
entries.synopsis: Kaneki drifts further from humanity as tensions rise between ghoul factions and the agency hunting them.

entries.title: Tokyo Ghoul:re
entries.synopsis: Years later, an amnesiac Kaneki leads a special investigator squad hunting the very ghouls he once fought alongside.

entries.title: Tokyo Ghoul:re 2nd Season
entries.synopsis: As his memories return, Kaneki must choose sides in an escalating war between ghouls and the humans who hunt them.

entries.title: Your Name.
entries.synopsis: A city boy and a countryside girl mysteriously begin swapping bodies, forming a bond that pulls them toward a shared fate.

entries.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
entries.synopsis: After swallowing a cursed relic to save his friends, high schooler Yuji Itadori is drawn into the hidden world of jujutsu sorcerers.

entries.title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
entries.synopsis: A prequel following Yuta Okkotsu as he enrolls at Jujutsu High while haunted by a cursed spirit bound to his childhood friend.

entries.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 2
entries.synopsis: A flashback arc reveals Gojo's past before the story returns to Itadori and a devastating string of sorcerer deaths.

entries.title: One Piece
entries.synopsis: A rubber-bodied boy sails the Grand Line with his crew, hunting for the legendary treasure that would make him Pirate King.

entries.title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
entries.synopsis: An exiled prince gains a mind-control power and leads a rebellion against the empire occupying his homeland under a masked identity.

entries.title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion R2
entries.synopsis: Having lost his memories, Lelouch must reclaim his resolve as the rebellion escalates toward a final confrontation with the empire.

entries.title: Mob Psycho 100
entries.synopsis: A powerful but emotionally repressed psychic middle-schooler tries to live a normal life while working for a con-artist exorcist.

entries.title: Mob Psycho 100 II
entries.synopsis: Mob faces a shadowy organization of espers while wrestling with his own bottled-up emotions and the meaning of strength.

entries.title: Mob Psycho 100 III
entries.synopsis: In the final season, Mob confronts new threats and old rivals as he searches for his own sense of identity and purpose.

entries.title: Akame ga Kill!
entries.synopsis: A young fighter joins a band of assassins working to bring down a corrupt capital's ruling class from the shadows.

entries.title: Assassination Classroom
entries.synopsis: A class of misfit students is tasked with assassinating their tentacled, superpowered teacher before he destroys the Earth.

entries.title: Assassination Classroom 2nd Season
entries.synopsis: With the deadline approaching, Class 3-E deepens its bond with Koro-sensei while training for their final, bittersweet attempt.

entries.title: Bleach
entries.synopsis: A teenager who gains soul-reaper powers takes up the duty of protecting the living from evil spirits and guiding souls to the afterlife.

entries.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War
entries.synopsis: An army of Quincies launches an all-out invasion of the Soul Society, forcing Ichigo back into a war he thought was over.

entries.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Separation
entries.synopsis: With the Soul Society in ruins, the surviving captains regroup while Ichigo confronts devastating truths about his own power.

entries.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Conflict
entries.synopsis: Captains and Quincy commanders clash directly as the true scale of the Quincy king's plan begins to surface.

entries.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Final
entries.synopsis: The war reaches its climax as Ichigo and his allies make their final stand against the Quincy king to decide the fate of all worlds.

entries.title: Haikyu!!
entries.synopsis: A short but determined boy joins his high school's volleyball club, teaming up with a gifted but difficult setter to reach nationals.

entries.title: Haikyu!! Second Season
entries.synopsis: Karasuno prepares for the Interhigh preliminaries, sharpening new strategies and confronting stronger rival teams.

entries.title: Haikyu!!: Karasuno High School vs Shiratorizawa Academy
entries.synopsis: Karasuno faces its biggest test yet in a high-stakes match against the powerhouse Shiratorizawa Academy team.

entries.title: Haikyu!!: To the Top
entries.synopsis: Now aiming for the national spring tournament, Karasuno's players push their individual growth to new limits.

entries.title: Haikyu!!: To the Top Part 2
entries.synopsis: The road to nationals continues as Karasuno battles through the spring tournament's toughest opponents.

entries.title: Haikyu!! The Dumpster Battle
entries.synopsis: The long-awaited rematch between Karasuno and Nekoma finally plays out on the big screen.

entries.title: Haikyu!! The Battle of Concepts
entries.synopsis: The direct continuation of the Karasuno-Nekoma showdown, following the match to its dramatic conclusion.

entries.title: Parasyte -the maxim-
entries.synopsis: A high schooler is forced to share his body with a parasitic alien organism after it fails to fully take over his brain.

entries.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion
entries.synopsis: A withdrawn teenager is recruited to pilot a giant bio-mechanical mech to defend humanity from mysterious beings called Angels.

franchise: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai

entries.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
entries.synopsis: A high schooler helps his upperclassman cope with a strange condition that makes people forget she exists, called Puberty Syndrome.

entries.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
entries.synopsis: A new Puberty Syndrome case involving a childhood friend forces Sakuta to confront a painful memory from his past.

entries.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of Santa Claus
entries.synopsis: Sakuta faces a new Puberty Syndrome phenomenon tied to his younger sister as the group's relationships continue to evolve.

entries.title: Dr. Stone
entries.synopsis: After humanity is turned to stone for millennia, a brilliant science-obsessed teen wakes up and sets out to rebuild civilization.

entries.title: Dr. Stone: Stone Wars
entries.synopsis: The Kingdom of Science prepares for a decisive confrontation against the rival Tsukasa Empire over the future of humanity.

entries.title: Dr. Stone: New World
entries.synopsis: Senku and his crew set sail for a distant continent in search of the source of the petrification light.

entries.title: Dr. Stone: New World Part 2
entries.synopsis: Senku's team confronts the origin of the petrification phenomenon as new allies and rivals emerge on the new continent.

entries.title: Dr. Stone: Science Future
entries.synopsis: The final story arc begins as the Kingdom of Science races to complete humanity's revival while facing its ultimate challenge.

entries.title: Dr. Stone: Science Future Part 2
entries.synopsis: The series concludes as Senku and his friends complete their journey to restore humanity and secure the future of science.

entries.title: Chainsaw Man
entries.synopsis: A young debt-ridden devil hunter fuses with his chainsaw devil dog to become a powerful hybrid hunter for a shadowy organization.

entries.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
entries.synopsis: Denji falls for a mysterious girl named Reze, unaware that their budding relationship hides a deadly secret.

entries.title: Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai: Tensai-tachi no Renai Zunousen
entries.synopsis: Two elite student council officers wage a secret psychological war, each trying to trick the other into confessing love first.

entries.title: Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai?: Tensai-tachi no Renai Zunousen (Season 2)
entries.synopsis: As the student council's term nears its end, Kaguya and Miyuki's shrinking time together raises the stakes of their romantic battle of wits.

entries.title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War -Ultra Romantic- (Season 3)
entries.synopsis: The student council's schemes intensify as new members join and old feelings finally start pushing toward honesty.

entries.title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War -The First Kiss That Never Ends-
entries.synopsis: After their first kiss, Kaguya and Shirogane still haven't voiced their feelings, so Christmas becomes the next battlefield of pride.

entries.title: Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai: Otona e no Kaidan (Stairway to Adulthood)
entries.synopsis: Years after graduation, Kaguya looks back through an old photo album at the wholesome, silly memories of her first days dating Miyuki.

entries.title: Black Clover
entries.synopsis: An orphan born without magic pushes himself to physical extremes to keep pace with his gifted rival on the path to becoming Wizard King.

entries.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
entries.synopsis: Four exiled former Wizard Kings return with overwhelming power, forcing Asta and the Clover Kingdom's mages into a desperate defense.

entries.title: Spy x Family Part 1
entries.synopsis: A master spy forms a fake family with a telepathic orphan and a secret assassin to infiltrate an elite school and prevent a war.

entries.title: Spy x Family Part 2
entries.synopsis: With her first Stella Star earned, Anya gets a new dog while Loid uncovers a dangerous plot to assassinate a government minister.

entries.title: Spy x Family Season 2
entries.synopsis: The Forger family faces new personal and professional challenges, including a tense cruise-ship mission for Yor.

entries.title: Spy x Family Code: White
entries.synopsis: A family vacation meant to help Anya win a cooking contest instead pulls the Forgers into a plot that threatens world peace.

entries.title: Fairy Tail
entries.synopsis: A young wizard joins the rowdy, powerful Fairy Tail guild and finds a found family bound by loyalty through countless dangerous jobs.

entries.title: Fairy Tail (2014)
entries.synopsis: The Grand Magic Games reach their climax as Fairy Tail fights for the guild's honor while a mysterious threat looms over Fiore.

entries.title: Fairy Tail: Final Series
entries.synopsis: After the guild's disbandment, Natsu and his friends reunite to fight the Alvarez Empire in Fairy Tail's final, guild-defining war.

entries.title: Fairy Tail: 100 Years Quest
entries.synopsis: Years after Fairy Tail's greatest war, the guild's core members take on a legendary job no one has dared attempt in a century.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure (Phantom Blood / Battle Tendency)
entries.synopsis: Across two generations of the Joestar family, an English gentleman and his grandson battle a vampiric foe and inhuman pillar men.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stardust Crusaders
entries.synopsis: Jotaro Kujo and a crew of Stand users travel from Japan to Egypt to save his mother from a resurrected, century-old vampire.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stardust Crusaders - Battle in Egypt
entries.synopsis: Jotaro's group reaches Egypt, where only the strongest Stand users stand between them and the vampire Dio's inner circle.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable
entries.synopsis: In the quiet town of Morioh, Josuke Higashikata and his friends investigate a string of bizarre Stand-related disappearances.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind
entries.synopsis: Giorno Giovanna, son of the vampire Dio, joins a mafia organization hoping to reform it into something honorable from within.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stone Ocean Part 1
entries.synopsis: Framed for a crime she didn't commit, Jolyne Kujo awakens a new Stand power and fights to escape a prison holding dark secrets.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stone Ocean Part 2
entries.synopsis: Jolyne and her allies dig deeper into the conspiracy behind her imprisonment, confronting increasingly dangerous Stand users.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stone Ocean Part 3
entries.synopsis: The battle for the prison reaches its climax as Jolyne's group closes in on the mastermind behind the sixth Joestar tragedy.

entries.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run - 1st Stage
entries.synopsis: A paralyzed former jockey joins a transcontinental horse race and crosses paths with a mysterious rider chasing hidden treasure.

entries.title: Darling in the Franxx
entries.synopsis: Paired child pilots fight monstrous Klaxosaurs in giant mechs, until one boy meets a horned girl who upends his entire world.

entries.title: Vinland Saga Season 1
entries.synopsis: A young Viking mercenary chases revenge against his father's killer across a brutal, war-torn Norse frontier.

entries.title: Vinland Saga Season 2
entries.synopsis: Enslaved on a farm after losing everything, Thorfinn must find a new purpose beyond the endless cycle of violence and revenge.

entries.title: Overlord
entries.synopsis: When his VR game fails to shut down, a lone player finds himself trapped as his powerful undead avatar in a living game world.

entries.title: Overlord II
entries.synopsis: Ainz Ooal Gown expands his influence over the new world, juggling a lizardman uprising and his double life as an adventurer.

entries.title: Overlord III
entries.synopsis: Ainz's carefully hidden schemes push him further toward inadvertent world domination as two great kingdoms edge toward war.

entries.title: Overlord IV
entries.synopsis: As the newly founded Sorcerer Kingdom struggles with instability, Ainz confronts rival nations plotting against his rule.

entries.title: Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom
entries.synopsis: A demon emperor's invasion of the crumbling Sacred Kingdom forces Ainz and his undead army into a desperate alliance.

franchise: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
entries.synopsis: Reincarnated as a slime after a sudden death, an office worker builds a nation of monsters in a fantasy world.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 2 Part 1
entries.synopsis: Rimuru returns to his growing nation of Tempest just as it comes under attack from a mysterious group of human invaders.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 2 Part 2
entries.synopsis: Newly awakened as a true Demon Lord, Rimuru goes on the offensive against the enemy responsible for Tempest's invasion.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 3
entries.synopsis: Now a recognized Demon Lord, Rimuru opens Tempest to the world while a false declaration of war threatens fragile new alliances.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Season 4
entries.synopsis: As Tempest's alliance between humans and monsters grows, rival demon lords and a rising new hero threaten Rimuru's fragile peace.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Scarlet Bond
entries.synopsis: A conspiracy in a neighboring nation pulls Rimuru into an adventure alongside Hiiro, a survivor of an all-but-extinct ogre clan.

entries.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Blue Sea
entries.synopsis: A relaxing island vacation for Rimuru and friends is interrupted by a mysterious woman and a new incident on the open sea.

entries.title: Kakegurui
entries.synopsis: At an elite academy secretly ruled by high-stakes gambling, a thrill-seeking transfer student upends the school's rigid hierarchy.

entries.title: Kakegurui×× (Season 2)
entries.synopsis: A high-stakes election for control of the school's ruling clan pushes Yumeko and her allies into their riskiest gambles yet.

entries.title: Horimiya
entries.synopsis: A popular girl and a quiet, tattooed classmate accidentally discover each other's hidden sides and grow steadily closer.

entries.title: Horimiya: The Missing Pieces
entries.synopsis: Smaller, previously unanimated moments between Hori, Miyamura, and their friends fill in gaps left by the first season.

entries.title: Fate/stay night
entries.synopsis: A young mage is drawn into a deadly tournament of summoned heroic spirits competing for an all-powerful wish-granting relic.

entries.title: Fate/Zero (Season 1)
entries.synopsis: A decade before Fate/stay night, seven ruthless mages and their summoned heroic spirits clash in the fourth Holy Grail War.

entries.title: Fate/Zero (Season 2)
entries.synopsis: As an uneasy truce collapses, the remaining Masters resort to increasingly desperate tactics as the war nears its brutal end.

entries.title: Fate/stay night: Unlimited Blade Works (Season 1)
entries.synopsis: A retelling of the fifth Holy Grail War from mage Rin Tohsaka's perspective as she reluctantly teams with fellow student Shirou.

entries.title: Fate/stay night: Unlimited Blade Works (Season 2)
entries.synopsis: With Saber captured, Shirou must decide whether his ideal of heroism is genuine as the Holy Grail War reaches its final battles.

entries.title: Fate/strange Fake
entries.synopsis: A false, distorted Holy Grail War breaks out in an American city, drawing in a cast of servants and masters unlike any before.

entries.title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel I. Presage Flower
entries.synopsis: Ten years later, a new Holy Grail War forces Shirou to protect his gentle, secretive underclassman Sakura Matou.

entries.title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel II. Lost Butterfly
entries.synopsis: A mysterious black shadow begins killing Masters and Servants across the city as Shirou refuses to abandon Sakura.

entries.title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song
entries.synopsis: As the Holy Grail War reaches its final battle, Shirou confronts fate itself to save Sakura from the sins consuming her.

entries.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
entries.synopsis: A disgraced shut-in is reborn as an infant in a magical world and resolves to live his second chance to the fullest.

entries.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 2 Part 1
entries.synopsis: Rudeus grapples with heartbreak and a listless routine after Eris leaves, until a brush with danger snaps him out of it.

entries.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 2 Part 2
entries.synopsis: The second cour of Season 2 continues Rudeus's journey as new relationships and responsibilities take shape.

entries.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 3
entries.synopsis: The story continues into the Eris Training Arc, exploring how much Eris has grown since the previous season.

entries.title: Fire Force
entries.synopsis: A young pyrokinetic firefighter joins a special brigade that battles humans who spontaneously combust into infernal monsters.

entries.title: Fire Force Season 2
entries.synopsis: Company 8 uncovers deeper conspiracies behind the Infernals as tensions with rival fire brigades escalate.

entries.title: Fire Force Season 3 Part 1
entries.synopsis: The final season begins as Company 8 pushes deeper into the mysteries surrounding the Evangelist and the Great Cataclysm.

entries.title: Fire Force Season 3 Part 2
entries.synopsis: The series concludes its story, bringing the battle against the Evangelist and the fate of the world to a close.

entries.title: Classroom of the Elite
entries.synopsis: A seemingly detached student at an elite school slowly reveals his calculating nature amid ruthless class competitions.

entries.title: Classroom of the Elite Season 2
entries.synopsis: New rivalries and hidden agendas emerge as the class faces high-stakes special exams and shifting alliances.

entries.title: Classroom of the Elite Season 3
entries.synopsis: The first-year arc reaches its climax as manipulations behind the scenes come further into the light.

entries.title: Classroom of the Elite Season 4
entries.synopsis: Now second-years, the students face a new semester with fresh classmates, rules, and psychological maneuvering.

entries.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
entries.synopsis: An elven mage who outlives her human companions sets out to better understand mortals after the hero's party disbands.

entries.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Season 2
entries.synopsis: Frieren, Fern, and Stark press onward through the dangerous Northern Plateau toward the coveted First-Class Mage Exam's next trial.

entries.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End - Golden Land Arc
entries.synopsis: The announced third season, adapting the manga's Golden Land arc, is scheduled for a future release.

entries.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid
entries.synopsis: An office worker's quiet life is upended when a dragon she saved shows up at her door insisting on becoming her maid.

entries.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid S
entries.synopsis: Kobayashi's household grows livelier as more dragons settle into human life alongside old and new friends.

entries.title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A Lonely Dragon Wants to be Loved
entries.synopsis: A feature film following the found family of dragons and humans as a new dragon struggles to connect with others.

entries.title: My Dress-Up Darling
entries.synopsis: A shy classmate skilled in traditional doll-making crafting is drawn into the world of cosplay by an outgoing gyaru gamer.

entries.title: My Dress-Up Darling Season 2
entries.synopsis: Wakana and Marin deepen their bond while tackling ever more ambitious cosplay projects and personal growth.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins
entries.synopsis: A princess seeks out a legendary group of disbanded knights, wrongly branded traitors, to help reclaim her kingdom.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Revival of the Commandments
entries.synopsis: The Ten Commandments are unleashed, forcing the Sins into an escalating war against the Demon Clan.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Imperial Wrath of the Gods
entries.synopsis: The battle against the Ten Commandments intensifies as the Goddess Clan and Demon Clan's ancient war reignites.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Dragon's Judgement
entries.synopsis: The final season of the original saga brings the conflict between the Sins and the Demon King to a head.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Four Knights of the Apocalypse
entries.synopsis: Percival, grandson of Meliodas, sets off on a journey after his peaceful village life is shattered, uncovering a new prophecy.

entries.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Four Knights of the Apocalypse Season 2
entries.synopsis: Percival and his companions press deeper into the Chaos in Liones arc as new Knights of the Apocalypse are revealed.

entries.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
entries.synopsis: A street kid in dystopian Night City chooses to become a mercenary outlaw equipped with illegal cyberware.

entries.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2
entries.synopsis: A standalone follow-up set in Night City featuring an entirely new cast with no direct narrative link to Season 1.

entries.title: Hellsing Ultimate
entries.synopsis: A faithful, ultra-violent adaptation of the manga following Alucard and the Hellsing Organization's war on the undead.

entries.title: Komi Can't Communicate
entries.synopsis: An overwhelmingly popular but crippingly shy high schooler enlists a classmate's help to make 100 friends.

entries.title: Komi Can't Communicate Season 2
entries.synopsis: Komi and her growing circle of friends navigate new school events, festivals, and budding relationships.

entries.title: The God of High School
entries.synopsis: A high schooler enters a nationwide martial arts tournament promising the winner any wish, uncovering a hidden conspiracy.

entries.title: Dandadan
entries.synopsis: A believer in ghosts and a believer in aliens dare each other to prove the paranormal, unleashing chaos in both their lives.

entries.title: Dandadan Season 2
entries.synopsis: Momo and Okarun's supernatural entanglements deepen as new spirits, aliens, and rivals complicate their bond.

entries.title: The Eminence in Shadow
entries.synopsis: A boy who dreamed of being a mastermind is reborn in another world and secretly builds a shadowy organization while play-acting as a hidden power.

entries.title: The Eminence in Shadow Season 2
entries.synopsis: Cid continues to grow stronger while keeping his powers hidden, as Shadow Garden becomes entangled in larger political and magical conflicts.

entries.title: The Eminence in Shadow: Lost Echoes
entries.synopsis: An announced anime film continuing the story of Cid Kagenou and Shadow Garden; release date not yet confirmed.

entries.title: The Apothecary Diaries
entries.synopsis: A skilled apothecary sold into servitude at the imperial palace uses her medical knowledge to solve mysteries plaguing the royal court.

entries.title: The Apothecary Diaries Season 2
entries.synopsis: Maomao continues investigating mysteries within the inner palace while her bond with Jinshi deepens amid political intrigue.

entries.title: The Apothecary Diaries Season 3
entries.synopsis: A confirmed third season, set to premiere in split cours starting October 2026 and continuing in April 2027.

entries.title: The Apothecary Diaries: Original Film
entries.synopsis: An original anime film set for a December 2026 Japanese premiere, announced alongside Season 3.

entries.title: Call of the Night
entries.synopsis: A sleepless boy befriends a charming vampire in nighttime Tokyo and must decide whether to give up his humanity to join her world.

entries.title: Call of the Night Season 2
entries.synopsis: Ko and Nazuna's relationship deepens as new vampires and nighttime complications enter their lives.

entries.title: Solo Leveling
entries.synopsis: The weakest hunter in the world gains a mysterious system that lets him grow endlessly stronger after a near-fatal dungeon incident.

entries.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Arise from the Shadow
entries.synopsis: As dungeon incidents escalate, Jin-Woo draws more attention from hunter guilds while an ominous, decade-old threat resurfaces.

franchise: The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity

entries.title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity
entries.synopsis: A gentle romance blossoms between a delinquent-perceived boy and a refined girl from a rival, elite all-girls academy.

entries.title: Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead
entries.synopsis: A burned-out office worker finds new joy in life after a zombie apocalypse frees him from his miserable corporate job.

entries.title: Summer Time Rendering
entries.synopsis: A young man returns to his hometown for a funeral and discovers a time-looping mystery tied to a shadowy, shapeshifting threat.

entries.title: Sentenced to Be a Hero
entries.synopsis: A disgraced knight is condemned to endless resurrection as an expendable 'Hero' and leads a penal unit against demonic forces.

entries.title: Sentenced to Be a Hero Season 2
entries.synopsis: A confirmed second season continuing Xylo and Teoritta's fight against the demonic Blight; date not yet announced.

entries.title: Lycoris Recoil
entries.synopsis: Two young female agents of a covert peacekeeping organization run a cafe by day while secretly protecting the city from threats.

entries.title: Mieruko-chan
entries.synopsis: A high school girl who can suddenly see terrifying ghosts does everything she can to pretend she doesn't notice them.

entries.title: Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out!
entries.synopsis: A quiet college student just wants peace and quiet, but his energetic, small-statured underclassman constantly drags him out to hang out.

entries.title: Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out! Double
entries.synopsis: Uzaki and Sakurai's playful, teasing friendship continues to grow as new characters join their circle of friends.

entries.title: Sakamoto Days
entries.synopsis: A retired legendary hitman-turned-family-man must fight off former enemies and colleagues while keeping his ordinary life intact.

entries.title: Sakamoto Days Season 2
entries.synopsis: A confirmed second season continuing Taro Sakamoto's fight against assassins from his past; date not yet announced.

entries.title: Gachiakuta
entries.synopsis: A slum-dwelling scavenger falsely accused of murder is thrown into a monster-filled trash pit and becomes a Cleaner to survive and seek revenge.

entries.title: Gachiakuta 2nd Season
entries.synopsis: Second season continuing Rudo's story as a Cleaner fighting Trash Beasts in the Pit; announced sequel with no air date confirmed yet.

entries.title: Tokyo Revengers
entries.synopsis: A washed-up man gains the power to time-leap into his middle school past to save his ex-girlfriend from a deadly gang conspiracy.

entries.title: Tokyo Revengers: Seiya Kessen-hen
entries.synopsis: Also known as Christmas Showdown; Takemichi time-leaps again to confront the rival Black Dragon gang and save Hinata's fate.

entries.title: Tokyo Revengers: Tenjiku-hen
entries.synopsis: Also known as Tenjiku Arc; Takemichi confronts the dangerous gang Tenjiku and its enigmatic leader Izana to save Mikey from ruin.

entries.title: Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen
entries.synopsis: Also known as War of the Three Titan Arc; the direct sequel to Tenjiku-hen, set to premiere Fall 2026.

franchise: The Misfit of Demon King Academy

entries.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
entries.synopsis: The legendary Demon King reincarnates two thousand years later and enrolls in an academy that no longer recognizes his true identity or legacy.

entries.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy II
entries.synopsis: Anos seeks peace as a misfit again, but demons, kings, and deities plot against him as rumors spread of a rival power called the Child of God.

entries.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy II Part 2
entries.synopsis: The second half of Season 2, continuing the Selection Judgement arc as Anos battles rivals plotting to seize power in the spirit world.

franchise: The Daily Life of the Immortal King

entries.title: The Daily Life of the Immortal King
entries.synopsis: A young cultivator who hides godlike immortal powers tries to live an ordinary life among mortals at a martial arts school, donghua Season 1.

entries.title: The Daily Life of the Immortal King 2
entries.synopsis: Season 2 continues the immortal protagonist's efforts to stay hidden while new powerful rivals and mysteries emerge at his school.

entries.title: The Daily Life of the Immortal King 3
entries.synopsis: Season 3 escalates the stakes as the protagonist's concealed cultivation powers draw the attention of increasingly dangerous forces.

entries.title: The Daily Life of the Immortal King 4
entries.synopsis: Season 4 continues the blend of low-key school comedy and high-stakes cultivator conflict as secrets about the protagonist's past surface.

entries.title: The Daily Life of the Immortal King 5
entries.synopsis: The fifth season continues the immortal protagonist's balancing act between mundane school life and escalating cultivator threats.

entries.title: Guilty Crown
entries.synopsis: A socially awkward student gains a power to draw weapons from people's hearts and gets pulled into a resistance movement against an occupying force.

entries.title: Guilty Crown: Lost Christmas - An Episode of Port Town
entries.synopsis: An original prequel short following two escaped experimental subjects, Scrooge and Carol, hunted by psychic pursuers in a near-future port town.

entries.title: Dororo
entries.synopsis: A limbless, senseless boy hunted of his body parts by demons wanders feudal Japan with a young orphan thief.

entries.title: Tower of God (Kami no Tou)
entries.synopsis: A boy named Bam opens the gates of a mysterious Tower by himself to chase after the only friend he has ever known.

entries.title: Tower of God: Return of the Prince (Kami no Tou: Ouji no Kikan)
entries.studio: The Answer Studio (per secondary source; not confirmed via Jikan full-record fetch)
entries.synopsis: Six years after the first Regular selection, new hopefuls including Wangnan face the Tower's 20th Floor trials alongside a mysterious returning face.

entries.title: Tower of God: Workshop Battle (Kami no Tou: Koubou-sen)
entries.studio: The Answer Studio (per secondary source; not confirmed via Jikan full-record fetch)
entries.synopsis: The second cour of Tower of God Season 2, continuing the Regulars' trials and rivalries as the Workshop Battle arc unfolds.

entries.title: BOFURI: I Don't Want to Get Hurt, so I'll Max Out My Defense.
entries.synopsis: A VRMMO newbie dumps every stat point into defense and accidentally becomes an unkillable, absurdly overpowered player.

entries.title: BOFURI: I Don't Want to Get Hurt, so I'll Max Out My Defense. 2
entries.studio: SILVER LINK. (inferred from Season 1; not confirmed via Jikan full-record fetch)
entries.synopsis: Maple and her guild members return to New World Online for new events, foes, and increasingly ridiculous overpowered antics.

entries.title: To Be Hero X (Tu Bian Yingxiong X)
entries.studio: Pb Animation, LAN Studio, Paper Plane Animation Studio, B.COOL STUDIO
entries.synopsis: In a world where a hero's superpowers are fueled by public trust data displayed on their wrist, the top-ranked hero X faces an unraveling mystery.

entries.title: Arcane: League of Legends - Season 1
entries.synopsis: Two sisters end up on opposite sides of a brewing conflict between the utopian city of Piltover and the oppressed underground of Zaun.
entries.image_url: NOT AVAILABLE — Arcane is not indexed on MyAnimeList/Jikan

entries.title: Arcane: League of Legends - Season 2
entries.synopsis: The final season pushes the Piltover-Zaun conflict toward its climax as estranged sisters Vi and Jinx are pulled back into each other's orbit.
entries.image_url: NOT AVAILABLE — Arcane is not indexed on MyAnimeList/Jikan

entries.title: Mashle: Magic and Muscles
entries.synopsis: A magic-less boy relies purely on raw muscle to survive a prestigious magic academy that would otherwise have him executed.

entries.title: Mashle: Magic and Muscles - The Divine Visionary Candidate Exam Arc
entries.synopsis: Mash's secret is exposed and he must compete against elite magic users in a high-stakes exam to become a Divine Visionary.

entries.title: Shangri-La Frontier
entries.synopsis: A gamer famed for beating terrible games dives into a critically acclaimed VR game and quickly proves himself an elite player.
entries.source_url: UNVERIFIED numeric MAL ID (candidate 52347 per Wikidata cross-reference, NOT independently confirmed via Jikan). Dates/studio confirmed via web search: Oct 1 2023-Mar 31 2024, C2C, 25 episodes

entries.title: Shangri-La Frontier 2nd Season
entries.synopsis: Sunraku takes on a legendary god-tier raid boss, forming new alliances and rivalries as the game's stakes grow deadlier.

entries.title: Witch Hat Atelier
entries.synopsis: A girl who glimpses forbidden magic is taken in by a kind witch and begins training among an atelier of fellow apprentices.

entries.title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword
entries.synopsis: A swordsman without magic fights his way through a mage academy's dungeons to keep a promise to his childhood friend.

entries.title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2
entries.synopsis: Will and his classmates face a mysterious mage ambush during dungeon training ahead of a decisive academy exit exam.

entries.title: Hell's Paradise: Jigokuraku
entries.synopsis: A condemned ninja and his executioner set out for a mysterious island said to hold the elixir of immortality.

entries.title: Hell's Paradise: Jigokuraku 2nd Season
entries.synopsis: Gabimaru's group reaches the fortress of the island's monstrous rulers, forcing former enemies to cooperate to survive.
